perPage.storyBeat: In a city that never stops moving, every second counts...

panelDetails.altText: Wide shot of a bright futuristic city at dawn, elevated highways weaving between glass towers. Characters: Mia, Bob (B-0B).
Mia straps a glowing package onto Bob's back, determined grin. Characters: Mia, Bob (B-0B). Dialogue: "COME ON, BOB! WE CAN'T BE LATE!"
panelDetails.dialogue: COME ON, BOB! WE CAN'T BE LATE!

panelDetails.altText: Bob speeds down a ramp on his single wheel, sparks flying. Characters: Bob (B-0B). Sound effect: VROOM.
Bob wobbles and nearly drops the package off a bridge, Mia lunging after it. Characters: Mia, Bob (B-0B). Sound effect: WHOOPS!

perPage.storyBeat: But even the clumsiest robot can surprise you...

panelDetails.altText: The rival courier's hoverbike cuts across Mia and Bob's path. Characters: Rival Courier. Dialogue: "TOO SLOW, JUNKPILE!"
Bob fires his grappling-hook arm at a passing sky-tram. Characters: Bob (B-0B). Sound effect: THWIP.
Mia and Bob swing over the rival, city lights streaking below. Characters: Mia, Bob (B-0B). Dialogue: "BOB, YOU GENIUS!"
Splash panel: the package delivered at the doorstep as the sun rises, Mia and Bob triumphant. Characters: Mia, Bob (B-0B).
